LightningComponentBundle.description: Sticky top navigation: monogram logo, 01–04 section links, and Resume button with a staggered on-load entrance.

property.name: initials
property.label: Logo Initials
property.description: Monogram shown in the logo mark.

property.name: resumeUrl
property.label: Resume URL
property.description: Link for the Resume button. Leave blank to hide it.
